# terrible_community_general_hwc_vpc_security_group_rule (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `direction` (String) Specifies the direction of access control. The value can be egress or ingress.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `security_group_id` (String) Specifies the security group rule ID, which uniquely identifies the security group rule.

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `description` (String) Provides supplementary information about the security group rule. The value is a string of no more than 255 characters that can contain letters and digits.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `ethertype` (String) Specifies the IP protocol version. The value can be IPv4 or IPv6. If you do not set this parameter, IPv4 is used by default.
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `port_range_max` (Number) Specifies the end port number. The value ranges from 1 to 65535. If the protocol is not icmp, the value cannot be smaller than the port_range_min value. An empty value indicates all ports.
- `port_range_min` (Number) Specifies the start port number. The value ranges from 1 to 65535. The value cannot be greater than the port_range_max value. An empty value indicates all ports.
- `protocol` (String) Specifies the protocol type. The value can be icmp, tcp, or udp. If the parameter is left blank, the security group supports all protocols.
- `remote_group_id` (String) Specifies the ID of the peer security group. The value is exclusive with parameter remote_ip_prefix.
- `remote_ip_prefix` (String) Specifies the remote IP address. If the access control direction is set to egress, the parameter specifies the source IP address. If the access control direction is set to ingress, the parameter specifies the destination IP address. The value can be in the CIDR format or IP addresses. The parameter is exclusive with parameter remote_group_id.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) Whether the given object should exist in Huawei Cloud.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
